requirement.description: Excel course setting import must support explicit targetSemesterId selection or new semester creation; must not auto-switch system global active semester

semesterSchemaAudit.activeSemantics: application-level invariant only; no DB constraint prevents multiple active semesters
semesterSchemaAudit.reason: Existing fields sufficient for target semester selection; no new fields needed

createApi.body: name, code, academicYear?, term?, startsAt?, endsAt?, isActive?
createApi.note: Can create semester without setting isActive; defaults to false

activateApi.note: Import flow should NOT call this; import target != system active

semesterResolver.note: Already supports explicit semesterId; falls back to active semester

importRuleConfig.gap: Config toggle exists in Settings but no import code reads or enforces it

l3PreviewRoute.gap: No semester parameter; purely structural parse with no DB interaction
l3PreviewRoute.neededChange: Accept targetSemesterId; optionally load semester-scoped existing data for match stats

l4Mapper.gap: Pure function; caller must load semester-scoped existingData
l4Mapper.neededChange: No mapper change needed; caller must scope existingData by semesterId

l5ReviewPackage.gap: Gates on boolean flag but does not store actual semester ID in output
l5ReviewPackage.neededChange: Add targetSemesterId to output; pass through from caller

l60FullPackage.gap: Same as L5; full package has no semester reference

importBatch.note: ImportBatch already requires semesterId; L6 apply must provide it

existingDocxImport.note: Docx import parse route already calls resolveSchedulerSemester(); can serve as reference pattern

Course.importBehavior: shared across semesters; upsert by name

Teacher.importBehavior: shared across semesters; upsert by name

Room.importBehavior: shared across semesters; upsert by name (if imported)

ClassGroup.importBehavior: create per target semester; match by (semesterId, nameHash)

TeachingTask.importBehavior: create per target semester; link to Course + Teacher (global) + semester

TeachingTaskClass.importBehavior: create join records linking semester-scoped TeachingTask + ClassGroup

ImportBatch.importBehavior: create one batch per import, scoped to target semester

ScheduleSlot.importBehavior: NOT created by course setting import (xlsx has no schedule)

ScheduleAdjustment.importBehavior: NOT created by course setting import

existingMode.description: User selects an existing semester from the list

createNewMode.description: User fills in new semester details; created before import dry-run

blockers: semester has no valid date range (warning)
warnings: target semester differs from active semester

createNewSemesterContract.preCondition: User selects createNew mode in import UI
flow: 1. User fills name/code/dates in import dialog
2. Frontend calls POST /api/semesters (existing API) to create
3. New semester created with isActive=false by default
5. Import flow proceeds with the new ID as targetSemesterId
createNewSemesterContract.rollback: If import is abandoned, user can manually delete the empty semester via Settings
createNewSemesterContract.noTransactionRequired: Semester creation is a single-row insert; no complex transaction needed

components.name: TargetSemesterSelector
components.description: Dropdown showing all semesters from GET /api/semesters, with recommended target highlighted
components.position: Above the upload/preview area, before file selection

components.name: CreateNewSemesterForm
components.description: Inline form with name/code/startDate/endDate fields, toggled by 'Create new semester' link

components.name: SetAsActiveCheckbox
components.description: Checkbox to set newly created semester as active (future phase, not L6-B)

components.name: DecoupleNotice
components.description: Text notice: 'This selection only determines the target semester for this Excel import. It will not automatically switch the system current semester.'

flow: 3. User selects existing semester OR clicks 'Create new'
4. If create new: form appears, user fills details
7. L4 dry-run loads existing data scoped to target semester

nextStages.name: L6-B-XLSX-COURSE-SETTING-TARGET-SEMESTER-PREVIEW-INTEGRATION
nextStages.description: Add targetSemesterId to L3 preview UI/API; re-run L4 dry-run with semester-scoped existingData; generate review package with targetSemesterId

nextStages.name: L6-C-XLSX-COURSE-SETTING-CREATE-NEW-SEMESTER
nextStages.description: Support creating new semester from import flow; only creates Semester row; no teaching task import

nextStages.name: L6-D-XLSX-COURSE-SETTING-APPROVAL-PACKAGE-WITH-TARGET-SEMESTER
nextStages.description: Generate full review package with resolved targetSemesterId; all decisions pending; no apply

nextStages.name: L6-E-XLSX-COURSE-SETTING-CONTROLLED-APPLY-PLAN
nextStages.description: Design apply plan with backup/rollback/transaction/approval gate; no execution

nextStages.name: L6-F-XLSX-COURSE-SETTING-CONTROLLED-APPLY-EXECUTION
nextStages.description: Execute apply only after explicit user approval; backup, atomic transaction, post-apply audit, rollback plan
nextStages.writesScope: ImportBatch + Course + Teacher + ClassGroup + TeachingTask + TeachingTaskClass
